textByHash.072bfdbc8baabb908213e7821b965793d6dd4c1f: Ha ha! Puny human scared of me!
textByHash.2845ca70b98447420ae8a7fd344e01c8a56e8c0d: You go quick! I keep guard busy!
textByHash.5858c919516d5de68a8068b4ff106a2acbfe88cd: Generals say we help you rescue Chosen Commander.
textByHash.9711f4b1b3c2b95e06d727cb29cb7c42eaf1954f: So we come to look after you so you not die.
textByHash.bb955a867eb648a4c8c08e8eae5210e35aab06c5: Look, there new hole with ladder just next to climby-out rope. We go down there.
textByHash.d134fb52ab6bb08dc3acd32a045794f5ae6b85d2: What we waiting for? We must go down into tunnel and rescue Chosen Commander!
